briefs.title: Council to vote on $1.35M contract for modular four-plex housing pilot in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a $1,354,463 contract to Echelon Creative Inc. to build a modular four-unit rental home at 8315 14th Avenue as a pilot project testing factory-built, low-carbon construction methods.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the April 14, 2026 council decision — it could signal more modular housing projects in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — modular four-plex contract award decision
